import '@kne/current-lib_react-file/dist/index.css';
import '@kne/current-lib_react-file/dist/index.css';
const readmeConfig = {
    name: `react-file`,
    summary: `<p>React文件操作组件库，提供文件上传、多格式预览、下载、列表管理及文件系统浏览的完整解决方案，支持国际化。</p>
<h3>主要特性</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>文件上传</strong> - 支持单文件/多文件上传，可自定义文件类型、大小限制和并发数</li>
<li><strong>文件预览</strong> - 根据文件类型自动选择预览方式，支持图片、音频、视频、PDF、Office文档、HTML、Markdown、JSON、ZIP、文本等</li>
<li><strong>文件下载</strong> - 支持OSS文件ID下载、直接URL下载和Blob数据下载</li>
<li><strong>文件列表</strong> - 展示已上传文件列表，支持上传中状态、预览、下载、删除操作</li>
<li><strong>文件系统</strong> - 提供文件系统浏览组件，支持图标、列表、分栏、画廊四种视图模式</li>
<li><strong>图片处理</strong> - 支持默认头像、性别区分头像、加载骨架屏和失败占位图</li>
<li><strong>打印功能</strong> - 内置打印按钮组件，支持打印前/后回调</li>
<li><strong>国际化</strong> - 内置中英文语言包，支持多语言切换</li>
</ul>
<h3>组件概览</h3>
<h4>File</h4>
<p>文件组件，通过OSS文件ID获取文件URL，使用render props模式。</p>
<h4>FileUpload</h4>
<p>文件上传组件，支持单文件和多文件上传，可自定义接受的文件类型和上传限制。</p>
<h4>FilePreview</h4>
<p>文件预览组件，根据文件类型自动选择合适的预览方式。支持本地URL和OSS文件ID两种方式。</p>
<h4>FileList</h4>
<p>文件列表组件，用于展示和管理已上传的文件，支持上传中状态、预览、下载和删除操作。</p>
<h4>FileButton</h4>
<p>文件操作按钮组件，点击后弹出文件预览弹窗，支持下载和打印。</p>
<h4>Download</h4>
<p>文件下载按钮组件，支持OSS文件ID下载和直接URL下载。</p>
<h4>Image</h4>
<p>图片组件，支持默认头像、性别区分的头像显示，以及加载失败时的占位图。</p>
<h4>FileSystem</h4>
<p>文件系统浏览组件，提供图标、列表、分栏、画廊四种视图，支持导航历史和搜索。</p>
<h4>PrintButton</h4>
<p>打印按钮组件，用于触发浏览器打印功能。</p>`,
    description: `React文件操作组件库，提供文件上传、多格式预览、下载、列表管理及文件系统浏览，支持i18n`,
    packageName: `@kne/react-file`,
    api: `<h3>File</h3>
<p>文件组件，通过OSS文件ID获取文件URL，使用render props模式。内部使用<code>withOSSFile</code> HOC获取文件URL。</p>
<h4>属性</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>OSS文件ID，必填</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>children</td>
<td>function({ url, ...props })</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>render props函数，参数包含获取到的文件URL</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>apis</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>自定义API配置，会与全局preset.apis合并</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>loading</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>null</td>
<td>加载中显示的内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>error</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>加载失败显示的内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ttl</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>6000000</td>
<td>缓存过期时间（毫秒）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cacheName</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>'file-cache'</td>
<td>缓存名称</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h3>FileUpload</h3>
<p>文件上传组件，支持单文件和多文件上传。</p>
<h4>属性</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>value</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>[]</td>
<td>已上传文件列表（受控）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>defaultValue</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>[]</td>
<td>默认文件列表</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onChange</td>
<td>function(list)</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件列表变化回调</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>accept</td>
<td>string[]</td>
<td>['.pdf','.jpg','.png','.jpeg','.doc','.docx','.xls','.xlsx','.html','.msg','.eml','.zip']</td>
<td>接受的文件类型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>multiple</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>true</td>
<td>是否支持多文件上传</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>fileSize</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>100</td>
<td>单个文件最大尺寸（MB）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>maxLength</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>10</td>
<td>最大文件数量</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>concurrentCount</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>10</td>
<td>上传并发数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>size</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>按钮尺寸，同antd Button的size</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>showUploadList</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>true</td>
<td>是否显示已上传文件列表</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>children</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>'文件上传'</td>
<td>上传按钮文字</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>renderTips</td>
<td>function(defaultTips, { fileSize, maxLength, accept })</td>
<td>v =&gt; v</td>
<td>自定义提示信息渲染</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onSave</td>
<td>function(data, file, uuid)</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>上传成功后数据处理回调，返回值将作为新的文件对象</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ossUpload</td>
<td>function</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>自定义上传函数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>getPermission</td>
<td>function(type)</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件列表操作权限控制函数，type为'preview'/'delete'等</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>apis</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>API配置对象</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>renderModal</td>
<td>function(modalProps)</td>
<td>props =&gt; Modal</td>
<td>自定义弹窗渲染函数</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h3>FileInput</h3>
<p>文件输入组件，提供文件选择按钮。</p>

<table>

<h3>FilePreview</h3>
<p>文件预览组件，根据文件类型自动选择合适的预览方式。提供<code>src</code>时使用<code>TypePreview</code>，提供<code>id</code>时使用<code>OSSFilePreview</code>。</p>
<h4>属性</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>OSS文件ID</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>src</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件URL</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>filename</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件名，用于确定文件类型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>originName</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>原始文件名，作为filename的备选</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>apis</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>API配置对象</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>预览子组件</h4>
<p>以下子组件均可单独使用：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>

<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>

<td>图片预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AudioPreview</td>
<td>音频预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>VideoPreview</td>
<td>视频预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>PdfPreview</td>
<td>PDF预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>XlsxPreview</td>
<td>Excel预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>OfficePreview</td>
<td>Office文档预览（根据文件类型选择DocxPreview或XlsxPreview）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>HtmlPreview</td>
<td>HTML预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MarkdownPreview</td>
<td>Markdown预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>JsonPreview</td>
<td>JSON预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ZipPreview</td>
<td>ZIP压缩包预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>TextPreview</td>
<td>文本文件预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>未知类型文件预览</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>OSSFilePreview</td>
<td>OSS文件预览（通过ID获取URL后自动选择预览方式）</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<table>

</thead>

<tr>

<td>function</td>

<td>function</td>

<tr>
<td>...antd Button props</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>-</td>

</tr>

<td>defaultPath</td>
<td>string</td>

<td>string</td>

</tr>

</tr>

<h3>withOSSFile</h3>
<p>高阶组件，通过OSS文件ID获取文件URL并注入到被包裹组件。</p>
<h4>用法</h4>
<pre><code class="language-jsx">const MyComponent = withOSSFile(({ data, id, ...props }) =&gt; {
  // data 为获取到的文件URL
  return &lt;div&gt;{data}&lt;/div&gt;;
});
</code></pre>
<h4>被注入的属性</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>data</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>获取到的文件URL</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>fetchApi</td>
<td>object</td>
<td>react-fetch的API对象</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>格式化后的文件ID（去除了查询参数）</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h3>useFileUpload</h3>
<p>文件上传Hook，处理文件上传逻辑。</p>
<h4>参数</h4>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>multiple</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>true</td>
<td>是否支持多文件</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>fileSize</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>100</td>
<td>单个文件最大尺寸（MB）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>maxLength</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>10</td>
<td>最大文件数量</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>value</td>
<td>array</td>
<td>[]</td>
<td>已上传文件列表</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>concurrentCount</td>
<td>number</td>
<td>1</td>
<td>上传并发数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onAdd</td>
<td>function(file)</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件添加后回调（上传前）</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onError</td>
<td>function({ file, error, errMsg })</td>
<td>-</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>onSave</td>
<td>function(data, file, uuid)</td>
<td>-</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>onChange</td>
<td>function(list)</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>文件列表变化回调</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onUpload</td>
<td>function({ file })</td>
<td>-</td>

<td>fileList</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>onFileSelected</td>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

    title: `File`,
    description: `从oss获取文件地址`,
    code: `const { default: File } = _ReactFile;
const { createWithRemoteLoader, getPublicPath } = remoteLoader;

const BaseExample = createWithRemoteLoader({
  modules: ['components-core:Global@PureGlobal']
})(({ remoteModules }) => {
  const [PureGlobal] = remoteModules;
  return <PureGlobal preset={{
    ajax: async api => {
      return { data: { code: 0, data: api.loader() } };
    }, apis: {
      file: {
        staticUrl: getPublicPath('react-file') || window.PUBLIC_URL,
        getUrl: {
          loader: async ({ params }) => {
            return new Promise(resolve => {
              setTimeout(() => {
                resolve('/logo192.png');
              }, 1000);
            });
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }}>
    <File id="123">{({ url }) => {
      return url;
    }}</File>
  </PureGlobal>;
});

render(<BaseExample />);

});

    title: `FileUpload`,
    description: `文件上传`,
    code: `const { FileUpload } = _ReactFile;
const { createWithRemoteLoader, getPublicPath } = remoteLoader;

const urls = {};

const BaseExample = createWithRemoteLoader({
  modules: ['components-core:Global@PureGlobal']
})(({ remoteModules }) => {
  const [PureGlobal] = remoteModules;
  return <PureGlobal preset={{
    ajax: async api => {
      return { data: { code: 0, data: api.loader() } };
    }, apis: {
      file: {
        staticUrl: getPublicPath('react-file') || window.PUBLIC_URL,
        getUrl: {
          loader: async ({ params }) => {
            return new Promise(resolve => {
              setTimeout(() => {
                resolve(urls[params.id]);
              }, 1000);
            });
          }
        }, upload: ({ file }) => {
          urls[file.name] = URL.createObjectURL(file);
          return new Promise((resolve) => {
            setTimeout(() => {
              resolve({
                data: {
                  code: 0, data: {
                    id: file.name, filename: file.name
                  }
                }
              });
            }, 1000);
          });
        }
      }
    }
  }}>
    <FileUpload />
  </PureGlobal>;
});

render(<BaseExample />);

    title: `FilePreview`,
    description: `文件预览`,
    code: `const { FilePreview } = _ReactFile;
const { createWithRemoteLoader, getPublicPath } = remoteLoader;

const BaseExample = createWithRemoteLoader({
  modules: ['components-core:Global@PureGlobal', 'components-core:InfoPage']
})(({ remoteModules }) => {
  const [PureGlobal, InfoPage] = remoteModules;
  return (
    <PureGlobal
      preset={{
        ajax: async api => {
          return { data: { code: 0, data: api.loader() } };
        },
        apis: {
          file: {
            staticUrl: getPublicPath('react-file') || window.PUBLIC_URL,
            getUrl: {
              loader: async ({ params }) => {
                const urlMap = {
                  1: '/mock/resume.png',
                  2: '/mock/resume.pdf',
                  3: '/mock/resume.html',
                  4: '/mock/resume.txt',
                  5: '/mock/audio.wav',
                  6: '/mock/resume.docx',
                  7: '/mock/example.zip',
                  8: '/mock/resume.xlsx'
                };
                return new Promise(resolve => {
                  setTimeout(() => {
                    resolve(urlMap[params.id]);
                  }, 1000);
                });
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }}>
      <InfoPage>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览图片">
          <FilePreview id="1" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览PDF">
          <FilePreview id="2" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览HTML">
          <FilePreview id="3" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览TXT">
          <FilePreview id="4" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览AUDIO">
          <FilePreview id="5" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览OFFICE">
          <FilePreview id="6" filename="resume.docx" />
          <FilePreview id="8" filename="resume.xlsx" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
        <InfoPage.Part title="预览ZIP">
          <FilePreview id="7" />
        </InfoPage.Part>
      </InfoPage>
    </PureGlobal>
  );
});

render(<BaseExample />);

    title: `FileSystem`,
    description: `文件系统浏览`,
    code: `const { FileSystem } = _ReactFile;
const { createWithRemoteLoader, getPublicPath } = remoteLoader;
const { Segmented } = antd;
const { useState } = React;

const BaseExample = createWithRemoteLoader({
  modules: ['components-core:Global@PureGlobal', 'components-core:InfoPage']
})(({ remoteModules }) => {
  const [PureGlobal, InfoPage] = remoteModules;
  const [items] = useState([
    { kind: 'folder', path: 'documents/', name: 'Documents' },
    { kind: 'folder', path: 'documents/reports/', name: 'Reports' },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'documents/reports/Q3-report.pdf', name: 'Q3-report.pdf', size: 1024000 },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'documents/reports/Q4-report.xlsx', name: 'Q4-report.xlsx', size: 512000 },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'documents/meeting-notes.docx', name: 'meeting-notes.docx', size: 256000 },
    { kind: 'folder', path: 'images/', name: 'Images' },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'images/logo.png', name: 'logo.png', size: 45000 },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'images/banner.jpg', name: 'banner.jpg', size: 89000 },
    { kind: 'folder', path: 'archives/', name: 'Archives' },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'archives/project-backup.zip', name: 'project-backup.zip', size: 15728640 },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'readme.md', name: 'readme.md', size: 3200 },
    { kind: 'file', path: 'config.json', name: 'config.json', size: 1200 }
  ]);

  return (
    <PureGlobal preset={{
      ajax: async api => {
        return { data: { code: 0, data: api.loader() } };
      },
      apis: {
        file: {
          staticUrl: getPublicPath('react-file') || window.PUBLIC_URL
        }
      }
    }}>
      <InfoPage>
        <InfoPage.Part title="文件系统浏览">
          <FileSystem
            items={items}
            title="My Files"
            defaultView="list"
            onFileOpen={entry => {
              console.log('Open file:', entry);
            }}
            onSelectionChange={entry => {
              console.log('Selection changed:', entry);
            }}
          />
        </InfoPage.Part>
      </InfoPage>
    </PureGlobal>
  );
});

render(<BaseExample />);
